_default_input_directory_note: IMPORTANT FOR WINDOWS: A path copied from the File Explorer address bar normally uses backslashes, for example D:\Movies\Test. Do NOT paste that path directly here. Replace every backslash (\) with a forward slash (/), for example D:/Movies/Test. Doubled backslashes also work, for example D:\\Movies\\Test.
_inspection_mode_note: Valid choices: "stream" or "full". "stream" = inspect each file, show what will be removed, and immediately send it to an available worker. "full" = inspect every file and show the complete plan before any cleaning begins.
